name: dikon
description: A tiny copy-file dependency injection helper for TypeScript.
author: Artem Baranov <temoncher@yandex.ru>

scripts.check: oxfmt --check -c oxfmt.config.ts --disable-nested-config "*.ts" "!examples/**" && oxlint --disable-nested-config && tsc --noEmit --project tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir examples/react-simple check && pnpm --dir examples/react-complex check
scripts.format:examples: pnpm --dir examples/react-simple format && pnpm --dir examples/react-complex format
